calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-07-2023 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar May-26-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for default prove-up hearing.

Dept. 505; Judge Gail Dekreon; Clerk: N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 2:01:59 p.m. and concluding at 2:16:09 p.m.

Jenelle Welling Esq. appearing on behalf of Plaintiff ALicia Gallego who is placed under oath via Zoom Video Conference and testifies.
Defendant Nikrooz Niknahad not appearing.

Court offers a procedural history of the case.

ALicia Gallego is placed under direct examination.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff ALicia Gallego and against Defendant Nikrooz Niknahad.

Plaintiff ALicia Gallego is awarded judgment against Defendant Nikrooz Niknahad as follows:

Damages/Principal: $91,074.25
Pre-Judgment Interest: $28,043.80
Attorney Fees: $31,600.00
Costs: $637.00

Total Judgment: $151,355.05

Additionally, the oral contract of September/October 2019 between the parties is rescinded in it's entirety.

Proposed Judgment was submitted and signed by the Court. (D505)
